name: gomcp
description: Go framework for building Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers: struct-tag schemas, middleware, Gin/OpenAPI/gRPC adapters, stdio and Streamable HTTP. The published Glama entry references the stdio demo in examples/basic.

tools.name: greet_user
tools.description: Greet a user by name with a personalized greeting message

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search documents by keyword using full-text matching

tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description: Search documents using semantic embedding-based matching

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generate an analytics report asynchronously for a given topic

prompts: code_review - Code review assistant with language selection

stdio_transport.note: Claude Desktop, Cursor, and other MCP clients via command

streamable_http.note: Remote deployment with SSE notifications (Server.HTTP / Handler)

adapters.note: Import existing Gin routes, OpenAPI specs, or gRPC services as tools
